# Security Policy

## Security Support

This project has not had a public release yet.

Security fixes are applied on the current development line and will be
included in the next published version.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Do not open public issues for suspected vulnerabilities.

Use GitHub Security Advisories for private reporting:

- Repository Security tab
- `Report a vulnerability`
- Direct link: `https://github.com/zeybek/ulak/security/advisories/new`

Include:

- affected PostgreSQL version
- enabled protocol flags
- exact configuration involved
- reproduction steps or proof of concept
- impact assessment

You should receive an initial response as soon as practical. Valid reports will
be triaged privately, fixed on the active development line, and disclosed when
there is a safe public update path.
